rawIntent: [gestalt-maintenance/CONTEXT_ALIGNMENT] Reconcile docs/DOMAIN.md and docs/ARCHITECTURE.md: entity 'roles' exists in the domain model but no module references it. Decide whether to introduce the module under src/modules/roles/ or to remove the entity from the domain model.

successCriteria.description: The 'roles' entity is either removed from the domain model or a new module is introduced under src/modules/roles/.

constraints: RBAC enforced at middleware, never inline
outOfScope: Changes to API endpoints or UI components
Modifications to existing modules other than roles

ambiguities.description: Should the 'roles' entity be removed or should a new module be introduced?
options: Introduce a new module under src/modules/roles/
Remove the entity from the domain model
